metadata.description: Strategic foresight and futures analysis tools for Claude.

plugins.name: foresight-intelligence
plugins.description: Strategic foresight engine using IFTF methodology. Soft Predict Future (skill, instant) + Hard Predict Future (12-step agent, Python-computed). STEEEP matrix, structural drivers, historical analogues, four independent futures (Probable/Plausible/Possible/Preferable) with per-stakeholder conditional analysis.
